name: Task-custom_pinv_total
label: Purchase Invoice Total (TZS)
description: Sum of submitted Purchase Invoice amounts linked to this Task. Auto-updated by hooks_pinv_task.py on PINV submit/cancel.

name: Task-custom_combined_cost
label: Total Cost (EC + PINV)
description: Expense Claim total (actual_expense) + Purchase Invoice total. Auto-updated by hooks_pinv_task.py. Complete cost per Task/visit.
